title: Former CM Jagan to visit Vizag and Araku today
fullText: Former Chief Minister Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy is scheduled to visit Visakhapatnam and Alluri Sitharama Raju district on March 4 to take part in private programmes organised by leaders of the YSR Congress Party (YSRCP).As per the tentative itinerary, Mr. Jagan Mohan Reddy will arrive at Visakhapatnam airport at around 11 a.m and will proceed by helicopter to Araku Valley in Alluri Sitharama Raju district to attend a private event of a YSRCP leader. Published - March 03, 2026 11:21 pm IST
